clusters.label: schema-drift
clusters.fix: Re-applied iteration-8 fix after state revert: script-driven tenantId arg addition to repo method call sites across InMemoryAccountRepository.{test,hierarchy.test}.ts (findById/findByName/findByOwnerId/findByIndustry/delete/existsByName/countByIndustry/findWithChildren/findAncestors/getHierarchyDepth) and InMemoryOpportunityRepository.test.ts (delete). Migrated 'tenant-123'/'tenant-001' literals to TEST_TENANT_ID from @intelliflow/test-fixtures. Also retargeted 'should not throw when deleting non-existent opportunity' to match production's intentional throw behavior (both in-memory and Prisma).
